w4:filingStatus.label: Filing status
w4:filingStatus.so: Tani waa xaaladda guurka ee aad dooratay marka aad buuxinayso foomkan, taasoo go'aamisa inta canshuur ee shaqaaluhu kaa jarayo mushaharkaaga.
w4:filingStatus.en: This is the filing status you chose on this form, which affects how much tax your employer withholds from each paycheck.

w4:multipleJobs.label: Multiple jobs or spouse works
w4:multipleJobs.soTitle: Shaqo badan ama xaaska wuu shaqeeyaa
w4:multipleJobs.so: Haddii ay leedahay "Yes", waxay micnaheedu yahay adiga ama xaaskaaga waxaad haysataan in ka badan hal shaqo, taasoo bedeli karta inta canshuur ee laga jarayo si aanad u bixin canshuur ka yar tan saxda ah.
w4:multipleJobs.en: If this says "Yes", you or your spouse have more than one job, which changes the withholding math so you don't end up paying less tax than you owe.

w4:dependentsAmount.label: Dependents amount
w4:dependentsAmount.soTitle: Lacagta carruurta/qof kale ee aad masuul ka tahay
w4:dependentsAmount.so: Tani waa wadarta lacagta credit-ka carruurta iyo dadka kale ee aad masuul ka tahay, taasoo dhimaysa canshuurta laga jarayo mushaharkaaga.
w4:dependentsAmount.en: This is the total credit amount for your dependents, which reduces how much tax gets withheld from your pay.

w4:otherIncome.label: Other income
w4:otherIncome.so: Tani waa dakhli kale oo aanad ka helin shaqo, sida ribada ama saamiga, oo aad rabto in canshuur dheeraad ah laga jaro.
w4:otherIncome.en: This is other income you have (not from a job), like interest or dividends, that you want extra tax withheld for.

w4:deductions.label: Deductions
w4:deductions.so: Tani waa qiimaha dhimista canshuurta ee aad u baahan tahay haddii aad rabto in dhimis ka badan caadiga ah la xisaabiyo.
w4:deductions.en: This is the amount of itemized deductions you expect to claim beyond the standard deduction.

w4:extraWithholding.label: Extra withholding
w4:extraWithholding.so: Tani waa lacag dheeraad ah oo aad rabto in mushahar kasta laga jaro, taasoo kaa caawin karta inaadan dayn canshuur ah lahaan sannadka dambe.
w4:extraWithholding.en: This is an extra dollar amount you've asked to have withheld from each paycheck, to help avoid owing tax at the end of the year.
